# DelusionDetected

> Fired when a hallucination or delusion is detected in LLM output

**Channel:** webhook

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| delusionDetectionId | string | yes | - |
| delusionType | string | yes | - |
| severity | string | yes | - |
| confidence | number | yes | - |
| organizationId | string | yes | - |

## Published By

- Trigger: `manual`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `dispatchAlert`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
